tree.name: Tyler Kolek
tree.tradeDescription: NYK traded Daniel Diez, a 2027 2nd (MIN own), a 2029 2nd (least favorable), and a 2030 2nd (NYK own) to Portland for Tyler Kolek (drafted #34 by POR)

assetsGivenUp.name: Daniel Diez
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Portland in the 4-team Josh Hart trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Dani Diez came to NYK in the Josh Hart trade, then sent back to POR for Kolek

assetsGivenUp.name: Cam Reddish
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK traded Kevin Knox and a 2022 1st (CHA own, conditional, did not convey) to Atlanta for Cam Reddish, Solomon Hill, and a 2025 2nd (BRK own). Reddish was then sent to POR in 4-team Hart trade (Feb 2023).
assetsGivenUp.note: Diez was a secondary return from POR in the Hart trade. Full Hart trade cost also tracked in Josh Hart tree.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Knox
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 9th overall by NYK in 2018. Sent to ATL in Cam Reddish trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 1st Round Pick via CHA
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Charlotte in Kai Jones trade. Conditional, did not convey. Sent to ATL in Reddish trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kai Jones
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 19th overall by NYK in 2021, traded to Charlotte for conditional 2022 1st

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via MIN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Minnesota's 2027 second-round pick, sent to Portland in Kolek trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick (least favorable)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 2029 second-round pick (least favorable), sent to Portland in Kolek trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 2nd Round Pick via NYK
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own 2030 second-round pick, sent to Portland in Kolek trade
